Details: Department management role assignment and inter-department collaboration
Departments can be created with heads and members
Members can be assigned roles within departments
Department permissions control access to resources
Activity feed tracks all department actions
Resources can be shared between departments
Build department management with hierarchical structure heads and member assignment. Support department branding and customization.
Implement department member management with role assignment and bulk operations.
Create granular permission system for department resources with inheritance and overrides.
Build activity feed system tracking all department actions with filtering and search.
Implement resource sharing between departments with access control and tracking.
Create department-specific dashboard widgets showing activities stats and pending items.
